[CMP-mission-computer](../README.md) *(system)* / [CMP-planner](README.md) *(subsystem)*

# Planner

`CMP-planner`

| kind | status | conformance_level | level |
|---|---|---|---|
| component | draft | structural | subsystem |

At each decision event, composes a 512x512 map image (aircraft position, heading arrow, flight trail overlaid on an OpenStreetMap tile), builds a context-aware prompt from the event type and mission context, calls the VLM inference backend (Gemma 4 E2B via llama.cpp HTTP API), parses the JSON response, stores the scratchpad fields (progress, next_intent), and returns an RTL command on any failure.
